title: Interpretation Resolution and Context-Bound Model Use
description: Resolve governed interpretation deterministically and publish model-use packages through purpose-limited, privacy-filtered, context-bound approvals with non-side-effecting TEST adapters and separately governed PRODUCTION dispatch.
acceptance_criteria: ResolveInterpretation is deterministic across subject, domain, context, scope, authority, validity, confidence, and behavioral authority
Retracted, expired, superseded, disputed, context-inapplicable, or unauthorized states cannot control behavior
TEST-scoped interpretation and model-use approvals exercise package generation, redaction, expiration, revocation, recovery, and receipts without production dispatch
TEST adapters cannot publish to production models or external systems and TEST receipts cannot satisfy production evidence gates
PRODUCTION model-use packages require recognized authority, exact hashes, purpose limitation, privacy filtering, expiration, revocation, journaling, and immutable receipts
Prediction and forecasting remain downstream, noncanonical, and unable to mutate canonical knowledge state
